P

pane - Variable in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.View.GUI.GameBoardController
 
personalObjective - Variable in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.View.GUI.GameBoardController
 
pick(Card) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model.Player
Adds the specified card to the player's hand.
pickCard(MouseEvent) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.View.GUI.GameBoardController
Handles the event of picking a card from the displayed cards by clicking on its ImageView.
PickMessage - Class in it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Messages.ClientToServer
Message from client to server indicating that a player has picked a displayed playable card.
PickMessage(int, int, String) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Messages.ClientToServer.PickMessage
Constructs a PickMessage with the specified parameters.

PLANT_BACKGROUND - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.View.CLI.AnsiColor
 
PLANT_KINGDOM - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model.Content
 
PLANT_TEXT - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.View.CLI.AnsiColor
 
PlayableCard - Class in it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model
the PlayableCard is an abstract class representing all the cards that can be played on the playground, i.e.
PlayableCard(int) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model.PlayableCard
Constructs a new PlayableCard instance with the specified card ID.
playCard(PlayableCard, boolean, Coordinate) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model.Player
Plays the specified card on the player's ground at the given coordinates.
playCard(PlayableCard, boolean, Coordinate) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model.PlayerGround
This method is used to add a card in the play area with the specified orientation and in the specified position.
playCard(String, int, boolean, Coordinate) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Controller.GameController
Allows a player to play a card in their Playerground.
PlayCardMessage - Class in it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Messages.ClientToServer
Message from client to server indicating that a player wants to play a card.
PlayCardMessage(int, int, boolean, Coordinate, String) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Messages.ClientToServer.PlayCardMessage
Constructs a PlayCardMessage with the specified parameters.
Player - Class in it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model
Class Player Description: This class represents a player in the game.
Player(String, GameServerInstance, int) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model.Player
Constructor for the Player class.
PlayerColor - Enum Class in it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model
The PlayerColor enum represents the different colors that a player can choose in the game.
playerCountColumn - Variable in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.View.GUI.LobbyGUIController
 
PlayerGround - Class in it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model
The PlayerGround class represents the play area of a player in the game.
PlayerGround() - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model.PlayerGround
Constructs a PlayerGround instance and initialize the ContentCounter, the Map for played cards, and the ArrayList for available positions, adding the Coordinate (0,0) to it.
playerNickname - Variable in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.View.GUI.WaitingController
 
PlayersListMessage - Class in it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Messages.ServerToClient
Message sent from server to client to update the list of player nicknames.
PlayersListMessage(int, ArrayList<String>) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Messages.ServerToClient.PlayersListMessage
Constructs a PlayersListMessage with the specified client ID and list of player nicknames.
POINT_FIVE - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.View.CLI.AnsiColor
 
POINT_ONE - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.View.CLI.AnsiColor
 
POINT_THREE - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.View.CLI.AnsiColor
 
POINT_TWO - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.View.CLI.AnsiColor
 
PositionNotAvailableException - Exception Class in it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Exceptions
Exception thrown when a position is not available for a specific operation.
PositionNotAvailableException(String) - Constructor for exception class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Exceptions.PositionNotAvailableException
Constructs a new PositionNotAvailableException with the specified detail message.
